demo-timeline.png.capture_command: python3 -m http.server 8000 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory . (repo root, via a temporary unflincher -> site symlink) ; Playwright MCP browser_resize(1440, 900) ; browser_navigate('http://localhost:8000/unflincher/demo/?view=timeline') ; browser_take_screenshot(type: 'png', scale: 'css', fullPage: false)
demo-timeline.png.runtime: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/151.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
